title: M8 1.0 content and endgame scope contract
summary: Define the 1.0 content, anomaly, faction, endgame, mod, long-save and localization scope before content implementation.
acceptance: Defines M8 1.0 content scope including 12-15 anomalies, faction/endgame arcs, stable data-mod workflow, long-save and localization targets
Separates 1.0 readiness from public release or store submission approval
Defines scenario/contracts and validation expectations for downstream content tasks
Preserves M0-M7 baselines and owner gates
Does not implement runtime content or change schemas

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until WM-0111 is done.
Drafted M8 1.0 content/endgame scope contract and WM-0121 report; required checks pass, with pnpm quality run via Corepack pnpm 11.8.0 after the default shim failed engine checks.

verified: No blocking findings. Acceptance evidence confirmed: M8 1.0 content/endgame scope is planning-only, preserves M0-M7 baselines and owner gates, defines downstream anomaly/faction/endgame/data-mod/long-save/localization contracts, and touches no apps/packages/tools/schema/runtime content data.
Independent reviewer verified WM-0121; integration gate passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Acceptance evidence confirmed: M8 1.0 content/endgame scope is planning-only, preserves M0-M7 baselines and owner gates, defines downstream anomaly/faction/endgame/data-mod/long-save/localization contracts, and touches no apps/packages/tools/schema/runtime content data.

integration.summary: Independent reviewer verified WM-0121; integration gate passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality.
